# Gary's Tech Hub

> Gary's Tech Hub provides professional computer repair, tech support, and IT services in Ireland.

## About
Gary's Tech Hub (garystechhub.ie) is a local technology services business offering computer repair, laptop repair, virus removal, data recovery, network setup, and general IT support for home and business customers in Ireland.

## Services
- Computer & Laptop Repair
- Virus & Malware Removal
- Data Recovery
- Network Setup & Troubleshooting
- Hardware Upgrades
- Software Installation & Configuration
- IT Support & Consultancy
- Smart Home Setup

## Contact
- Website: https://garystechhub.ie
- Location: Ireland
